news.headline: Arsenal reach first Champions League final in 20 years after Saka goal beats Atletico
news.summary: Arsenal is back in the Champions League final for the first time in 20 years thanks to a late first-half goal from Bukayo Saka that secured a 1-0 win over Atletico Madrid on Tuesday.

news.headline: Before Vatican trip, Rubio defends Trump remarks on Pope Leo over Iran
news.summary: Comments come before Marco Rubio’s meeting with Pope Leo XIV at the Vatican on Thursday.

news.headline: Israel kills one boy, injures officers in strike on Gaza police station
news.summary: A 15-year-old boy, Mahmoud Sahweil, was killed when Israel struck a Gaza police station.
